note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.description: Verify Highlighter can be added to group activity and is visible in Preview/Reader
testcases.raw: TC_01HighlighterFunctionality Verify Highlighter can be added to group activity and is visible in Preview/Reader 1. Drag and drop Highlighter to group activity. 2. Open Preview/Reader. Highlighter appears and is usable in both views.

testcases.description: Verify question text formatting: number/alphabet/special character/language
testcases.raw: TC_02HighlighterUI Verify question text formatting: number/alphabet/special character/language 1. Enter question text with numbers, alphabets, special characters, other language. 2. Preview/Reader. Text is formatted and displays correctly in all styles.

testcases.description: Verify answer text formatting: number/alphabet/special character/language
testcases.raw: TC_03HighlighterUI Verify answer text formatting: number/alphabet/special character/language 1. Enter answer text with numbers, alphabets, special characters, other language. 2. Preview/Reader. Text is formatted and displays correctly in all styles.

testcases.description: Verify different font, alignment, text color, background, math eq. in Preview/Reader
testcases.raw: TC_04HighlighterUI Verify different font, alignment, text color, background, math eq. in Preview/Reader 1. Apply alignment, font, color, background, math equation to text. 2. Preview/Reader. Formatting is applied and visible as expected.

testcases.description: Verify ordered/unordered lists, hyperlinks, additional components in Highlighter
testcases.raw: TC_05HighlighterUI Verify ordered/unordered lists, hyperlinks, additional components in Highlighter 1. Add lists, hyperlinks, components. 2. Preview/Reader.All are visible and functional.

testcases.description: Verify user can highlight words in sentence in Highlighter
testcases.raw: TC_06HighlighterFunctionality Verify user can highlight words in sentence in Highlighter 1. Add sentence. 2. Select and highlight word(s). Highlight is applied and visible in Preview/Reader.

testcases.description: Verify user can add and delete sentences; delete icon visible only when sentence exists
testcases.raw: TC_07HighlighterFunctionality Verify user can add and delete sentences; delete icon visible only when sentence exists 1. Add sentence. 2. Delete sentence. Delete icon appears only when sentence is present; sentence is removed on click.

testcases.description: Verify incorrect word with arrow and marking in red after click
testcases.raw: TC_08HighlighterFunctionality Verify incorrect word with arrow and marking in red after click 1. Select incorrect word/phrase. 2. Click arrow. Word is marked incorrect and appears in red.

testcases.description: Verify reverse arrow undoes incorrect marking and highlight in Preview/Reader
testcases.raw: TC_09HighlighterFunctionality Verify reverse arrow undoes incorrect marking and highlight in Preview/Reader 1. Highlight/mark incorrect. 2. Click reverse arrow.Marking/highlight is undone.

testcases.description: Verify Show Me button, Add Header, Add Instruction Text checkboxes enabled by default
testcases.raw: TC_10HighlighterFunctionality Verify Show Me button, Add Header, Add Instruction Text checkboxes enabled by default 1. Add Highlighter. 2. Check settings. All are checked by default and visible.

testcases.description: Verify Header and Instruction Text are hidden when respective checkboxes are unchecked1. Uncheck Add Header/Instruction Text. Header/instruction text section is hidden.
testcases.raw: TC_11HighlighterFunctionality Verify Header and Instruction Text are hidden when respective checkboxes are unchecked1. Uncheck Add Header/Instruction Text. Header/instruction text section is hidden.

testcases.description: Verify Style One selectable and Coming Soon style visible but not clickable
testcases.raw: TC_12HighlighterUI Verify Style One selectable and Coming Soon style visible but not clickable 1. View settings. 2. Try to select Style One/Coming Soon. Style One is selectable; Coming Soon is visible but disabled.

testcases.description: Verify No Outline and Outline options and color selection under Action Assets
testcases.raw: TC_13HighlighterUI Verify No Outline and Outline options and color selection under Action Assets 1. Change Outline/No Outline, select asset color. Outline appears with selected color; No Outline removes border.

testcases.description: Verify user can add multiple sentences and highlight independently
testcases.raw: TC_14HighlighterFunctionality Verify user can add multiple sentences and highlight independently 1. Add multiple sentences. 2. Highlight in each. Each sentence can be highlighted independently.

testcases.description: Verify Highlighter is non- editable after submission/completion
testcases.raw: TC_15HighlighterFunctionality Verify Highlighter is non- editable after submission/completion 1. Submit attempt. 2. Try editing/highlighting. Editing/highlighting is blocked post- submit.

testcases.description: Verify user can change answer in Reader after attempt (if allowed)
testcases.raw: TC_16HighlighterFunctionality Verify user can change answer in Reader after attempt (if allowed) 1. Attempt. 2. Change answer in Reader.Change is allowed only if permitted.

testcases.description: HighlighterCompatibility Verify attempted questions persist after close/reopen in different browsers/devices/environmen ts
testcases.raw: TC_17HighlighterCompatibility Verify attempted questions persist after close/reopen in different browsers/devices/environmen ts 1. Attempt all. 2. Close/reopen in various environments.Attempts persist as expected.

testcases.description: Verify Allow Activity Restart clears previous attempts and data
testcases.raw: TC_18HighlighterFunctionality Verify Allow Activity Restart clears previous attempts and data 1. Attempt/highlight. 2. Relaunch activity.Data/attempts are cleared.

testcases.description: Verify Add Tag option and tags functionality1. Add tag in settings.Tag is added and visible.
testcases.raw: TC_19HighlighterFunctionality Verify Add Tag option and tags functionality1. Add tag in settings.Tag is added and visible.

testcases.description: Verify UI adapts to minimize/maximize, mobile/tablet, and multiple browsers
testcases.raw: TC_20HighlighterUI Verify UI adapts to minimize/maximize, mobile/tablet, and multiple browsers 1. Minimize/maximize, use on various devices and browsers. UI adapts; component is responsive and usable.

testcases.description: Verify placeholder/helper text in all input fields
testcases.raw: TC_21HighlighterUI Verify placeholder/helper text in all input fields 1. Check header, instruction, sentence fields.Placeholder text is visible.

testcases.description: Verify consistent spacing and alignment in component and settings1. Review UI in editor, preview, reader. Elements are aligned and spaced consistently.
testcases.raw: TC_22HighlighterUI Verify consistent spacing and alignment in component and settings1. Review UI in editor, preview, reader. Elements are aligned and spaced consistently.

testcases.description: Verify submit button visibility and enablement after adding sentence1. Add sentence.Submit button is visible and enabled.
testcases.raw: TC_23HighlighterFunctionality Verify submit button visibility and enablement after adding sentence1. Add sentence.Submit button is visible and enabled.

testcases.description: Verify Show Me, Header, Instruction Text, Outline, Add Tag options cannot be used when disabled1. Uncheck options, try to use.Options inaccessible/hidden.
testcases.raw: TC_24HighlighterNegative Verify Show Me, Header, Instruction Text, Outline, Add Tag options cannot be used when disabled1. Uncheck options, try to use.Options inaccessible/hidden.

testcases.description: Verify delete icon is not visible when no sentence is present1. Do not add sentence.Delete icon is hidden.
testcases.raw: TC_25HighlighterNegative Verify delete icon is not visible when no sentence is present1. Do not add sentence.Delete icon is hidden.

testcases.description: Verify error for excessively long text in any field1. Add text exceeding allowed limit.Error/warning; input restricted.
testcases.raw: TC_26HighlighterNegative Verify error for excessively long text in any field1. Add text exceeding allowed limit.Error/warning; input restricted.

testcases.description: Verify error handling for invalid inputs in Highlighter component1.
testcases.raw: TC_27HighlighterNegative Verify error handling for invalid inputs in Highlighter component1. Enter invalid/special chars/empty inputs. Error/warning displayed; not accepted.

testcases.description: Verify user cannot edit Highlighter after submission/completion
testcases.raw: TC_28HighlighterNegative Verify user cannot edit Highlighter after submission/completion 1. Submit activity. 2. Try editing.Editing is blocked post-submit.

testcases.description: break/error after rapid add/remove/edit/highlight/un do/redo1. Perform rapid actions.UI remains stable; no errors.
testcases.raw: TC_29HighlighterNegative Verify no UI break/error after rapid add/remove/edit/highlight/un do/redo1. Perform rapid actions.UI remains stable; no errors.

testcases.description: Verify incorrect marking only possible on selected words/phrases
testcases.raw: TC_30HighlighterNegative Verify incorrect marking only possible on selected words/phrases 1. Try marking incorrect on blank/unselected area.Action not allowed.

testcases.description: Verify activity/highlight states do not persist after restart with new student1. Restart activity after highlighting.All highlights/markings are cleared.
testcases.raw: TC_31HighlighterNegative Verify activity/highlight states do not persist after restart with new student1. Restart activity after highlighting.All highlights/markings are cleared.

testcases.description: Verify error if network fails during submit/update
testcases.raw: TC_32HighlighterNegative Verify error if network fails during submit/update 1. Simulate network failure during submit/update.Error/warning; action fails gracefully.

testcases.description: Verify multiple sentences can be added, highlighted, and deleted independently
testcases.raw: TC_33HighlighterFunctionality Verify multiple sentences can be added, highlighted, and deleted independently 1. Add multiple sentences. 2. Highlight each. 3. Delete any sentence.Each sentence acts independently.

testcases.description: Verify Add Header, Add Instruction Text, Add Show Me are checked by default1. Add Highlighter, open settings.All three are checked by default.
testcases.raw: TC_34HighlighterUI Verify Add Header, Add Instruction Text, Add Show Me are checked by default1. Add Highlighter, open settings.All three are checked by default.

testcases.description: Verify user cannot highlight text if sentence is not present
testcases.raw: TC_35HighlighterNegative Verify user cannot highlight text if sentence is not present 1. Do not add sentence. 2. Try to highlight.Highlight is not possible; no error.

testcases.description: Verify Action Assets color picker is present and functional for Outline1.
testcases.raw: TC_36HighlighterUI Verify Action Assets color picker is present and functional for Outline1. Select Outline, change color.Border color changes as selected.

testcases.description: Verify user can add, edit, and delete tags in Highlighter1. Add tag, edit tag, delete tag.Tag changes reflect correctly.
testcases.raw: TC_37HighlighterFunctionality Verify user can add, edit, and delete tags in Highlighter1. Add tag, edit tag, delete tag.Tag changes reflect correctly.

testcases.description: Verify Delete button deletes component from author page
testcases.raw: TC_38Highlighter UI and Functionality Verify Delete button deletes component from author page 1. Click Delete button on component. 2. In confirmation pop-up, click "Delete". Component is deleted from author page.

testcases.description: Verify Copy button is present
testcases.raw: TC_39Highlighter UI and FunctionalityVerify Copy button is present 1. Locate Copy Component button on the screen. Copy Component button is visible on the page.

testcases.description: Verify Copy Component button is clickable1. Click the Copy Component button. Copy Component button is clickable; triggers copy action.
testcases.raw: TC_40Highlighter UI and Functionality Verify Copy Component button is clickable1. Click the Copy Component button. Copy Component button is clickable; triggers copy action.

testcases.description: Verify success pop-up after copying
testcases.raw: TC_41Highlighter UI and Functionality Verify success pop-up after copying 1. Click Copy Component button. 2. Observe pop-up message. Pop-up displays: "The component has been copied successfully".

testcases.description: Verify multiple copy actions
testcases.raw: TC_42Highlighter UI and FunctionalityVerify multiple copy actions 1. Click Copy Component button multiple times. 2. Observe pop-up each time. Pop-up appears each time component is copied.

testcases.description: Verify copied component appears correctly
testcases.raw: TC_43Highlighter UI and Functionality Verify copied component appears correctly 1. Click Copy Component button. 2. Verify a new copy of the component appears on the author page. Copied component is displayed and matches the original.

testcases.description: Verify copy action does not trigger for other buttons
testcases.raw: TC_44HighlighterNegative Verify copy action does not trigger for other buttons 1. Click other buttons (e.g., Delete, Add Sentence). 2. Observe pop-up message. "The component has been copied successfully" pop-up does not appear.

testcases.description: Verify copy action with no component present
testcases.raw: TC_45HighlighterNegative Verify copy action with no component present 1. Remove all components. 2. Check if Copy Component button is present and clickable. Copy Component button is not visible/clickable if no component exists.
